item.title: Timmons requests $21 million in state dollars to fix funding disparity for Western Washington University – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "Timmons requests $21 million in state dollars to fix funding disparity for Western Washington University – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: By resolution, reintroduced and retained in present status.
item.description: By resolution, reintroduced and retained in present status.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/By resolution, reintroduced and retained in present status.

item.title: 👍Faith Pettis - Chair, Board of Trustees, Western Washington University
item.description: Faith Pettis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Chair, Board of Trustees, Western Washington University.

item.title: 👍💵Nora Selander - Western Washington University
item.description: Nora Selander signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Western Washington University. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sabah Randhawa - President, Western Washington University
item.description: Sabah Randhawa signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent President, Western Washington University.

item.title: 👍Bill Lyne - United Faculty of Washington State
item.description: Bill Lyne signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent United Faculty of Washington State.

item.title: Whatcom County lawmakers look at priorities for remainder of legislative session | Cascadia Daily News
item.description: News article "Whatcom County lawmakers look at priorities for remainder of legislative session | Cascadia Daily News" from Cascadia Daily News.

item.title: 👍Aspen Cates-Doglio - President, Associated Students of Western Washington University
item.description: Aspen Cates-Doglio signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent President, Associated Students of Western Washington University.

item.title: 👍💵Christopher Rosenquist - Associated Students of Western Washington University
item.description: Christopher Rosenquist signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Associated Students of Western Washington University. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sophia Maynard - Vice President of Gov Affairs, Associated Students of Western Washington University
item.description: Sophia Maynard signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Vice President of Gov Affairs, Associated Students of Western Washington University.

item.title: 👍Steve DuPont - Central Washington University
item.description: Steve DuPont signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Central Washington University.
